meaning: n.企业,事业,计划,事业心,进取心,干事业
examples: Horse breeding is indeed a risky enterprise.
State bureaucracies can tend to stifle enterprise and initiative.
Its geographical location stimulated overseas mercantile enterprise.
The London version has only been open a few months and is an ambitious enterprise.
Its enterprise ratio is 19, just below the number for the U.S. Wal-Mart Stores.
